work.recent: Discover some of my recent work.

home.desc: Full-stack developer studying at École de technologie supérieure, with hands-on experience in Java, C#, Python, React and Next.js.

about.title: About
about.intro: Hi. I'm Cédrik, nice to meet you.
about.desc: Computer Science graduate from Cégep de Valleyfield (2023), now pursuing a Bachelor's at ÉTS. Experienced in full-stack development, DevOps and system administration. Currently looking for an internship to contribute and keep growing.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Submit the form below or reach me at <link>cedrikletarte@gmail.com</link>
contact.name: Name
contact.emailTitle: Here is an example of a valid email: example@gmail.com

server.title: Multifunctional Server
server.intro: Self-hosted Ubuntu server running containerized services with security hardening, remote access via VPN and fully automated maintenance.
server.autoDesc: Automated Docker container updates and Ubuntu unattended upgrades keep all services patched without manual intervention.

website.title: Portfolio
website.intro: Portfolio built with Next.js, TypeScript and Material UI. Supports French/English localization, dark/light mode and is deployed via Docker with a GitLab CI/CD pipeline.
website.skillsDesc: Next.js 16, TypeScript, React, MUI, Tailwind, Docker, GitLab CI/CD.
website.projectsDesc: Each project has its own detail page with descriptions, screenshots and tech used.
website.uxDesc: Scroll-triggered animations, glass morphism UI, smooth transitions and responsive layout.
website.securityDesc: Server-side rendering, IndexNow indexing, secure contact form with server-side validation.
website.designDesc: Full French and English support via next-intl, with locale-aware routing.
website.conclusion: This portfolio is itself a demonstration of my front-end and DevOps skills.

gaming.title: Video Game
gaming.intro: Team project built with Unity and C#. Players design their own 3D city and explore it in first-person, with Spider-Man-inspired movement mechanics.
gaming.goal1Desc: Intuitive 3D object placement interface to build and customize a city.
gaming.goal2Desc: Ergonomic build menu with smooth navigation using Unity UI.
gaming.goal3Desc: Orthogonal, free and FPS cameras for a seamless transition between build and explore modes.
gaming.goal4Desc: Sprint, jump, wallrun and web-swinging powered by Unity Physics.

ai.title: Giant Tic-Tac-Toe AI
ai.intro: University project: an AI agent playing Giant Tic-Tac-Toe — a nested 3×3 board where each move constrains the opponent's next play zone.
ai.minimax: Minimax with Alpha-Beta pruning to efficiently search a very large state space.
ai.heuristic: Custom heuristic evaluation function to prioritize winning moves.
ai.moves: Valid move generation respecting board constraints.
ai.network: Network interface to compete against other agents on a game server.

earth.title: Earth Globe
earth.intro: Interactive 3D globe built with Next.js and CesiumJS, featuring city search, custom self-hosted map tiles, atmospheric controls and a space skybox.
earth.globeDesc: CesiumJS renders a real-time interactive Earth with satellite imagery, 3D terrain and a physically-based atmosphere.
earth.searchDesc: Self-hosted Nominatim geocoder lets users search and fly to any city or location worldwide.
earth.mapDesc: Self-hosted TileServer-GL serves multiple tile styles switchable at runtime.
earth.skyboxDesc: 6-face space skybox with tunable atmospheric parameters for a realistic space environment.
